title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (24), PAGE 208, PARAGRAPH c, TITLE A, SECTION FOUR OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4184 / 57 OG No. 12, 2114 (March 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2890, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (24), PAGE 208, PARAGRAPH c, TITLE A, SECTION FOUR OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (24), page 208, paragraph c, Title A, Section four of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred and thirteen, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(24) Januiay Town Hall, Iloilo-

Completion...........P50,000.00."

SEC 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
